# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'mvn clean package', description: 'Build command to execute'),
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'mvn test', description: 'Test command to execute'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No deployment configured"', description: 'Deployment command to execute'),
        string(name: 'PRE_BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Pre-build command (optional)'),
        string(name: 'POST_BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Post-build command (optional)'),
        string(name: 'WORKING_DIRECTORY', defaultValue: '.', description: 'Working directory for commands'),
        choice(name: 'SHELL_TYPE', choices: ['bash', 'sh', 'zsh'], description: 'Shell to use for execution'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_TESTS', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip test execution'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_DEPLOYMENT', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip deployment'),
        booleanParam(name: 'VERBOSE_MODE', defaultValue: false, description: 'Enable verbose output'),
        text(name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES', defaultValue: '', description: 'Environment variables (KEY=VALUE format, one per line)'),
        string(name: 'BUILD_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '60', description: 'Build timeout in minutes'),
        string(name: 'TEST_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '30', description: 'Test timeout in minutes'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '30', description: 'Deployment timeout in minutes')
    ])
])

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    environment {
        CUSTOM_ENV_VARS = "${params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES}"
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Pipeline Configuration ==="
                    echo "Build Command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                    echo "Test Command: ${params.TEST_COMMAND}"
                    echo "Deployment Command: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND}"
                    echo "Working Directory: ${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}"
                    echo "Shell Type: ${params.SHELL_TYPE}"
                    echo "Skip Tests: ${params.SKIP_TESTS}"
                    echo "Skip Deployment: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT}"
                    echo "Verbose Mode: ${params.VERBOSE_MODE}"
                    echo "=============================="
                    
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES?.trim()) {
                        echo "Custom Environment Variables:"
                        params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES.split('\n').each { line ->
                            if (line.trim()) {
                                echo "  ${line}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_BUILD_COMMAND?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Pre-Build Command..."
                    executeCommand(params.PRE_BUILD_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.VERBOSE_MODE, 10)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Build Command..."
                    timeout(time: params.BUILD_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        executeCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.VERBOSE_MODE, params.BUILD_TIMEOUT.toInteger())
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Test Command..."
                    timeout(time: params.TEST_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        executeCommand(params.TEST_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.VERBOSE_MODE, params.TEST_TIMEOUT.toInteger())
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_BUILD_COMMAND?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Post-Build Command..."
                    executeCommand(params.POST_BUILD_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.VERBOSE_MODE, 10)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Deployment Command..."
                    timeout(time: params.DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        executeCommand(params.DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.VERBOSE_MODE, params.DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT.toInteger())
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo "Pipeline executed successfully!"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline execution failed!"
        }
        always {
            script {
                echo "=== Pipeline Summary ==="
                echo "Status: ${currentBuild.result ?: 'SUCCESS'}"
                echo "Duration: ${currentBuild.durationString}"
                echo "======================="
            }
        }
    }
}

def executeCommand(String command, String workDir, String shellType, boolean verbose, int timeout) {
    def envVars = []
    
    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES?.trim()) {
        params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES.split('\n').each { line ->
            if (line.trim() && line.contains('=')) {
                envVars.add(line.trim())
            }
        }
    }
    
    def envVarsString = envVars.join('\n')
    
    def shellCommand = """
${envVarsString}
cd ${workDir}
${verbose ? 'set -x' : ''}
${command}
"""
    
    if (isUnix()) {
        sh(script: shellCommand, returnStdout: false)
    } else {
        bat(script: command, returnStdout: false)
    }
}
